name: NVIDIA Grace LPDDR5X (GB200 NVL72)
source: https://www.nvidia.com/en-us/data-center/gb200-nvl72/ (GB200 NVL72: 36 Grace CPUs, each up to 480 GB LPDDR5X at up to 512 GB/s)
notes: Per-Grace-CPU coherent LPDDR5X memory used as the CPU-managed node memory tier (reached over CXL/NVLink-C2C within a node, scale-up across nodes). 480 GB at ~512 GB/s.
